pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage focused on starting a Hawaii vacation rental search. It loads featured islands/cities, quick date ideas, and a pre-filled guest selector, and exposes the global header search and account entry points.
primary_functions: Let users enter destination (with suggestions like Oahu, Maui, Kauai, Big Island), travel dates, guests, and pets, then start a search
Provide quick-search shortcuts for popular Hawaii destinations and date ranges
Surface entry points to view account/profile and wishlists via the header

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit main search form (destination + dates + guests/pets)
Click "Sign up" / "Create account" button in the homepage hero or header

access_methods.description: Primary entry via the "Home" header link and site logo
Users can arrive directly by typing the base URL or from search engines / referrals

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Displays rental search results with filters, sorting, and list/map views. It is the main workspace for refining Hawaii rental searches, using the active SearchContext and supporting both list and map discovery.
primary_functions: Show a list of rentals for the chosen destination, dates, guests, and pets, with key details like price, bedrooms, rating, and badges (oceanfront, entire home, etc.)

Provide filters for property type (entire home, condo), bedrooms, price range, rating, amenities (oceanfront, pool, wifi, kitchen, pet_friendly, free_parking, outdoor_space, long_stay_discount), and cancellation policy
Offer sorting options such as price_low_to_high, total_price_low_to_high, and rating_high_to_low
Allow users to toggle between list view and map view, pan/zoom the map, and select rentals from map markers
Let users click any result card to open the full listing details page

incoming_params.description: Destination.id selected in the search form or header search (e.g., Oahu, Maui, Kauai, Big Island, Honolulu)
Human-readable destination name for display in the UI
Check-in date in ISO 8601 format
Check-out date in ISO 8601 format
Number of adult guests
Number of child guests
Number of pets included in the search
Optional property type filter, e.g., 'entire_home' or 'condo'
Optional minimum bedrooms filter used for e.g., 1-bedroom or 3+ bedrooms searches
Optional maximum nightly price filter
Optional minimum rating filter, e.g., 4.5 or 4.7
Comma-separated list of amenity codes such as 'oceanfront,pool,wifi,kitchen,pet_friendly,free_parking,outdoor_space,long_stay_discount'
Minimum days of free cancellation required, e.g., 7
Whether to require long-stay discount eligible properties
Sorting option such as 'price_low_to_high', 'total_price_low_to_high', or 'rating_high_to_low'
Initial view mode, either 'list' or 'map'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a result card in list view
Click a rental marker on the map view and open full details
Submit new destination/dates via global header search while on results page

access_methods.description: Landing page after submitting a search from the homepage or header search bar
Shareable results URLs using query parameters for destination, dates, guests, and filters

pages.name: Listing Details
pages.description: Full detail page for an individual vacation rental. It binds a RentalProperty with the active search dates/guests to show a stay-specific price quote, wishlist saving, and booking/host messaging actions.
primary_functions: Display comprehensive rental information including photos, description, amenities, bedroom/bath counts, detailed location map, and approximate distance to key areas like Waikiki Beach
Show a clear price and fee breakdown for the selected stay (nightly rate, cleaning fee, discounts, other fees, and total before taxes)
Provide a prominent Book now / Reserve button to start the booking flow for the selected dates and guests
Allow users to save the rental to a wishlist, either adding to an existing wishlist (e.g., Favorites, Summer 2026, Honolulu Trip) or creating a new one
Enable users to contact or message the host via an inline message form or modal (e.g., to ask if an outdoor area is fully fenced for pets)

incoming_params.description: RentalProperty.id for the listing to display
Optional check-in date carried from the search context to quote stay pricing
Optional check-out date carried from the search context to quote stay pricing
Optional adults count from the originating search
Optional children count from the originating search
Optional pets count from the originating search

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Book now" / "Reserve" button (uses startBookingFromCurrentSearch then navigates to checkout)
Click "View all wishlists" link after saving a rental (optional UX after saveRentalToWishlist)
Submit a new search via the global header search while on a listing

access_methods.description: Accessed with rentalId (and optionally dates/guests) in the URL from search results or wishlists
Can be opened directly from a shared listing URL

pages.name: Checkout & Booking
pages.description: Multi-step booking page for confirming a reservation and handling payment options. It consumes the active Booking state to show price breakdowns, collect guest info, handle promo codes, and allow split payments before final confirmation.
primary_functions: Show booking summary including selected listing, dates, guests, itemized price breakdown, cleaning fee, discounts, and total cost
Collect guest information such as first name, last name, email, and phone number, and allow users to continue to the payment step without immediately entering payment details
Provide a promo code field (e.g., for ALOHA10), apply valid codes, and update the price summary to reflect any discounts
Offer payment options such as paying the full amount now or choosing a split payment plan (e.g., pay_50_now_50_later) for eligible bookings
Present final confirmation actions to complete a booking when the user is ready to submit payment details

incoming_params.description: Booking.id for the in-progress booking started from a listing

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Home" or logo link from the checkout page

access_methods.description: Reached from a listing's Book/Reserve button with a bookingId parameter

pages.name: Account & Profile
pages.description: Single-user account page for setting up basic account details and preferences. It acts as both "sign up" and "profile" in this single-user simulation, allowing preferred destination and contact info to be stored.
primary_functions: Allow the user to enter or update basic account details (e.g., name, email, password) to simulate account creation without any separate authentication flow
Let the user set and save preferences such as preferred destination or home location (e.g., Hawaii) and contact phone number
Provide links or shortcuts to related account areas such as wishlists and help/support

incoming_params.description: Optional indicator of how the user arrived (e.g., 'home_sign_up' vs 'header_account') to tweak copy or focus

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a "View wishlists" link from the profile page
Click on a support/help link in the account section
Submit a search via the global header search while on the profile page

access_methods.description: Can be opened directly (e.g., from a bookmarked account URL)

pages.name: Wishlists Overview
pages.description: Central page listing all user wishlists. It shows cover images and counts of saved rentals, and lets users manage the lifecycle of their wishlists.
primary_functions: Display all existing wishlists (e.g., Favorites, Honolulu Trip, Summer 2026) with cover images and counts of saved rentals
Allow users to create new wishlists and rename or delete existing ones
Let users click a wishlist to open its detailed view on the wishlist detail page

incoming_params.description: Optional wishlistId to highlight (e.g., newly created 'Honolulu Trip' or 'Summer 2026')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific wishlist card (e.g., 'Honolulu Trip', 'Summer 2026')
Submit a search via the global header search while viewing wishlists

pages.name: Wishlist Detail
pages.description: Shows all rentals saved to a specific wishlist. It allows users to open full listing pages, prune saved rentals, or spin up new searches inspired by the wishlist.
primary_functions: Display all rentals in the selected wishlist with thumbnails, key details (price, rating, bedrooms, destination), and quick-view information
Allow users to open any saved rental in the full listing details page to review information or start a booking
Enable users to remove rentals from the wishlist and optionally start a new search using the wishlists destination or dates as a template

incoming_params.description: Wishlist.id representing the wishlist to display (e.g., 'Honolulu Trip', 'Summer 2026')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved rental card in the wishlist to open full details
Click an action like "Search similar stays" that uses wishlist destination/dates as a template

access_methods.description: Accessed from the wishlists overview with the wishlistId parameter

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the Hawaii vacation rental booking site. It surfaces trust elements, Hawaii specialization, and key highlights about how the service works.
primary_functions: Explain the sites focus on Hawaii vacation rentals and what makes it unique or trustworthy
Provide background information such as mission, team, and service scope to build user confidence

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit a search via the global header search while on the About page

pages.name: Help & Contact
pages.description: Help center and contact page for user support. It provides FAQs on searching, booking, payments, promo codes, cancellations, long-stay discounts, and messaging hosts, plus direct contact options.
primary_functions: Offer FAQs and guidance on searching, filtering, booking, payments, promo codes, cancellations, long-stay discounts, and messaging hosts
Provide clear contact options such as a contact form, support email, and support phone number for additional help

incoming_params.description: Optional FAQ identifier used to deep-link to a specific FAQ (e.g., promo codes, cancellations)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit a search via the global header search while on the Help & Contact page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Help & Contact" footer link

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Legal and policy information related to using the site and booking stays. It aggregates terms, privacy, booking, cancellation, and long-stay discount policy content.
primary_functions: Present terms of use and privacy policy so users understand their rights and responsibilities
Summarize booking, payment, and cancellation policies, including how free cancellation windows and long-stay discounts work

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor specifying which part of the policies page to scroll to (e.g., 'terms', 'privacy', 'cancellation')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a contextual "Learn more in Help" link under a specific policy block
Submit a search via the global header search while on the Policies page

access_methods.description: Can be opened directly for terms/privacy deep links

header_links.description: Homepage with destination, dates, and guests search for Hawaii vacation rentals
View and manage all saved rental wishlists
Help center articles and contact options
Information about the vacation rental booking site
Account and profile details including preferences

footer_links.description: Learn more about the company and site
Get help and contact customer support
View terms of use, privacy, and booking policies
Access and manage your saved wishlists
Update your account details and preferences
